PROJECTS
Stock Tracker
•Built a stock tracking dashboard using Next.js, TypeScript, Chart.js, and REST APIs.
•Integrated authentication and personalized alerts.

Meme Generator
•Developed a React app with Tailwind CSS for generating and downloading memes.
•Implemented image upload and real-time preview.

Software Intern
•Built internal APIs using Node.js and Express.js.
•Worked with MongoDB and Docker during deployment.
